nasb.text: When there was war again, David went out and fought with the Philistines and defeated them with great slaughter, so that they fled before him.

esv.text: And there was war again. And David went out and fought with the Philistines and struck them with a great blow, so that they fled before him.

cnv.text: 後來，又有戰事；大衛出去與非利士人交戰，大敗他們，他們就在大衛面前逃跑。

ccb.text: 后来，战事再度爆发，大卫领兵与非利士人交战，大败敌人，杀得他们四散溃逃。
